title: Azhagiya Theeye Song Lyrics Minnale

Azhagiya Theeye Song Lyrics Minnale
#HarrishJayaraj   #HarishRagavendra

Hey azhagiya theeye
enai vaattugiraaye
oru kaihoo kavidhaigalil
nee paada paada

thalaikaerudhe naanum vaada

paavaigal unakkoru

unakulle

ennai yedho seidhuvittaal
common baby
dont do this baby
nenjai poo pol
koithuvittaal
dont'u ever do this(3)

aravae illai urakkam
adharkkum illai irakkam
imaigal ondraaga
eppodhum seraamal
idaiyil nindraaye
idhu niyayamaa

BP yaeri pochu ila ratham
nenjil kargil pola
oru yutham
adi artha raathiri
summer maadhiri
veppam thaakkuthadi
kannil

edhir nindru thaakkave
theeyum kaatrum ondru
serndhadho unnil

nee ennai suttadhum
analilittadhum
indha mattilum
po po podhum..

hey theeye azhagiya
theeye enai
vaattugiraaye
oru kaihoo kavidhaigalil
nee paada paada
oru hyper tension
thalaikaerudhe naanum vaada

never do this to me
dont ever do thi to me
baby...ye yeah..

unpeyar solli solli
ennaye naan marandhen
un minnal paarvayil
ennuyir naan tholaithen(2)

udhattil undhan peyar thaan
udalil undhan uyir thaan
nilathil nindraalum
nee engum sendraalum
naan unnai thodarkindra
nilallavaa

kadhal pithu yaeri
manam thaththa
avalai sekku pola
nee suththam
unai konjam konjamaai
thundam thundamaai
kondru pottadhu enna

kodi minnal kaatiya
dhegam yaavum
minnal polave minna

naan ennai ennidam
illai endruthaan
penne unnidam
vandhen thaeda.

seo.title: Azhagiya Theeye Song Lyrics Minnale
seo.description: Full Azhagiya Theeye songs lyrics, Minnale Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: Vaali, Music: Harrish Jeyaraj, Singer(s): Harish Ragavendra.
seo.keywords: Vaali, Minnale, Harrish Jeyaraj, Harish Ragavendra, Azhagiya Theeye full lyrics, Minnale songs lyrics, Azhagiya Theeye lyrics snippets, Azhagiya Theeye WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Azhagiya Theeye lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Azhagiya Theeye?

The song Azhagiya Theeye expresses deep romantic feelings and the excitement of love, highlighting the emotions of longing and affection.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie Minnale?

In Minnale, the song is a pivotal moment that showcases the protagonist's love and admiration for the heroine, enhancing the romantic narrative of the film.

Who is the singer and music director of Azhagiya Theeye?

The song is sung by Harish Ragavendra and composed by Harrish Jeyaraj, known for their remarkable collaboration in Tamil music.

When was Azhagiya Theeye released?

The song was released on February 2, 2001, as part of the movie Minnale.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Azhagiya Theeye is a vibrant romantic song from the movie Minnale that encapsulates the thrill of young love. The lyrics, penned by Vaali, beautifully express the protagonist's admiration and longing for his beloved. With Harish Ragavendra's melodious voice and Harrish Jeyaraj's captivating music, the song evokes feelings of joy and excitement. It serves as a perfect backdrop for romantic moments, making it a timeless favorite among fans.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Azhagiya Theeye from Minnale is a captivating romantic number that perfectly showcases Harish Ragavendra's soulful voice paired with Harrish Jeyaraj's enchanting music. The song's vibrant energy and heartfelt lyrics create an unforgettable listening experience that resonates with love and joy. Dive into this melodic journey that captures the essence of romance in Tamil cinema.
stanzaMeanings: Hey beautiful eyes, you are captivating me. In some poems, you sing, and I feel a lot of tension, I will also sing.
Is it an allergy for you to see her? Or is it energy within you?
If you do something to me, baby, don't do this. If you break my heart, it will hurt.
don't you ever do this
There is no noise, there is no sleep, there is no rest. Always standing here without joining, is this fair?
My blood pressure has risen, my heart feels like a battle, like a hot summer night, it is burning in my eyes.
The fire and the wind are coming together inside you.
You have burned me and also made me feel this way, enough of this...
Hey eyes, beautiful eyes, you are captivating me. In some poems, you sing, and I feel a lot of tension, I will also sing.
Never do this to me, don't ever do this to me, baby... yeah yeah..
I forgot your name, I lost my life in your glance.
Your name is in my heart, your life is in my body, even if you stand on the ground or if you come anywhere, I am always following you.
Love is crazy, the heart is restless, you are pure, you have taken me little by little, what is this?
The body that shows the lightning is like a lightning itself.
I have come to you because I have no one else, my dear.
Hey eyes, beautiful eyes, you are captivating me. In some poems, you sing, and I feel a lot of tension, I will also sing.
Is it an allergy for you to see her? Or is it energy within you?
If you do something to me,
Common baby, don't do this baby.
If you break my heart, it will hurt.
